title: Adding related articles on RELEASED features
excerpt:
Description
Hi Community managers! It will be SO helpful if you could attach a link to a relevant article (to a monday.com knowledge base page) once a new feature has been released. It will also prompt using the feature …

posts.author: DanaWD (Dana Wizman Danan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hi Community managers! It will be SO helpful if you could attach a link to a relevant article (to a monday.com knowledge base page) once a new feature has been released. It will also prompt using the feature faster. Thanks!

What are you trying to achieve

To have quick and official knowledge on new features - directly from the community update to monday.com Knowledge Base.

posts.author: devitus (Vitaly Dmitriev)
posts.cookedHtml: I second that. New features usually get released quietly, many of them don’t make the What’s new page, and it makes it very hard to know if some improvement is worth checking out. We need regular release notes.

posts.author: kasperhusted (Kasper Husted)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have also tried to address this before: I find the lack of release notes curious.

I assume it might have something to do with the fact that a lot of features go through Alpha and Beta stages before getting released gradually to different levels/licenses or even specific customers… but still… at some point you would think you could announce something as released for everyone.
